title: Investigation: The Irish Republican Socialist Party (NI)
text:
Subject: The Irish Republican Socialist Party (NI)

Investigated for: Failure to deliver the 2023 statement of accounts by the due date

Decision: One offence was found A £350 Variable Monetary Penalty was imposed, which was paid on 13 February 2026

Summary of reasons: A sanction was considered appropriate and proportionate in this case in line with our Enforcement Policy
